_comment: Risk manager parameters for the pairs trading engine. Edit and restart to take effect.
_max_drawdown_pct: Halt ALL trading if equity falls more than 15 % from its peak.
_max_position_pct: Never allocate more than 20 % of current balance as notional per trade.
_max_open_positions: Maximum number of concurrent open pairs positions.
_max_hold_days: Force-close any position still open after this many days.
_stop_loss_z: Close immediately when |z-score| reaches this level (pair diverging).
_entry_z_threshold: Open a position when |z-score| crosses this threshold.
_exit_z_threshold: Close a profitable position when |z-score| reverts below this level.
_cooldown_seconds: Minimum seconds between consecutive trades on the same pair.
_stale_price_seconds: Reject tickers older than this many seconds.
_z_window: Rolling window length (ticks) for live z-score computation.
_val_window: Longer window (ticks) used for cointegration / validation tests.
_revalidation_interval: Re-run cointegration test every N ticks (~4 min at 0.5 s/tick).
